languages.text: "А я как-то к ее ядам могу подготовиться?"
"Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"
languages.original_text: "А я как-то к ее ядам могу подготовиться?"

traits.locale_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"
"Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"
"Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"
"Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

languages.text: 「その毒に備える術はありますか？」
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: 「その毒に備える術はありますか？」

languages.text: « Est-il possible de me prémunir contre son poison ? »
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: « Est-il possible de me prémunir contre son poison ? »

languages.text: "Kendimi zehirlerine karşı hazırlamanın bir yolu var mı?"
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: "Kendimi zehirlerine karşı hazırlamanın bir yolu var mı?"

languages.text: «¿Hay alguna forma de prepararse contra sus venenos?».
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Hay alguna forma de prepararse contra sus venenos?».

languages.text: “有什么办法能让我应对它的毒素吗？”
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: “有什么办法能让我应对它的毒素吗？”

languages.text: "Gibt es eine Methode, mich auf seine Gifte vorzubereiten?"
languages.original_text: "Is there any way I can prepare myself for its poisons?"

traits.locale_text: "Gibt es eine Methode, mich auf seine Gifte vorzubereiten?"
